Property.Name: PlaneType
Property.sap:label: Plane Type
Property.sap:quickinfo: Flight Reference Scenario: Plane Type ID

Property.Name: MaximumSeats
Property.sap:label: Maximum Capacity
Property.sap:quickinfo: Flight Reference Scenario: Plane Seats Max

Property.Name: OccupiedSeats
Property.sap:label: Occupied Seats
Property.sap:quickinfo: Flight Reference Scenario: Plane Seats Occupied

Property.Name: LastChangedAt
Property.sap:label: Time Stamp
Property.sap:quickinfo: UTC Time Stamp in Long Form (YYYYMMDDhhmmssmmmuuun)

Annotation.String: Setting the text direction-layout is supported
PDF supports setting the text direction-layout (e.g. left-to-right or right-to-left) in the document description
